Align them: either change plan_funding_type to 'self_funded' or change the letter/clinical_context to 'fully-insured large-group employer-sponsored commercial PPO'. (Note: state mandates apply to fully-insured plans but are ERISA-preempted for self-funded — keep the funding type consistent for legal coherence.)
